title: Gemma 4 E2B Vision LoRA — xBD damage
subtitle: Gemma 4 E2B fine-tuned on xBD building-damage crops via Unsloth LoRA
description: Vision LoRA adapter merged into Gemma 4 E2B base for building-damage classification. Trained on the tunguz/xview2-challenge-dataset-train-and-test Kaggle mirror of the xBD dataset. Produced by FieldAgent / Gemma-Guardian hackathon team. Deploy via HuggingFace Transformers (NOT GGUF — Unsloth Issue #2290 causes vision loss in GGUF export for Gemma family).
